These photos have not been edited in any way to reduce or remove the appearance of any scratches or imperfections. Watch is fully linked and fits a wrist up to 8".

ACCESSORIES: This watch is a complete set. Included with this watch are its Rolex display box with outer box, Rolex guarantee card dated August 2022, operating manual, warranty/service booklet, serial number matched hangtag, bezel cover, and book/card sleeve. Also included with this watch is an Insurance Appraisal and Certificate of Authenticity which will be performed by our in-house NAJA certified watch appraiser on the date of purchase and will feature your name as well as all of the relevant details regarding this watch.

TWBG GUARANTEE: This watch, including it’s movement, has been inspected by our in-house CW21 certified watchmaker and is guaranteed to be authentic. The timekeeping accuracy, power reserve and amplitude are also guaranteed to meet/exceed manufacturer specifications (standards) for a period of 1 year from the date of delivery.

NOTICE: Per Chrono24 seller guidelines, we ask that communications/transactions originating on this platform stay on this platform.

PAYMENT: To place an order for this watch, hit the BUY button. You'll then have 48 hours to initiate the payment process before the transaction is cancelled and this watch is re-listed for purchase by others. Need more time to transfer funds or to submit the payment? No problem! Simply communicate with us when you expect the payment to be completed and we'll do our best to accommodate your timeline.

SHIPPING: All orders ship Adult Signature Required. If you aren’t at home during the day during the week, we recommend shipping to where you work or shipping “Hold for Pickup” to a FedEx Office, FedEx Print and Ship, or FedEx Ship Center near you, in which case, you can retrieve the package with your valid state ID at your convenience. Please Note: If you're having us ship to a FedEx location, be sure to enter “FEDEX - HOLD FOR PICK UP”, as well as the address of the FedEx location, at checkout. PLEASE NOTE: Chrono24 will only allow us to ship to the address listed in the transaction record and that changing the ship-to address after you’ve completed payment is trickier than you may think. During checkout, you'll have the opportunity to enter your desired ship-to address. To avoid shipping delays, be sure to enter the full and complete shipping address (including st/ave/blvd, business name, and floor/suite/unit/apartment number, if applicable).

INTERNATIONAL ORDERS: You will be responsible for all taxes/duties at the point of entry into your country. This includes VAT, if applicable. No, we will not under-report the value of the watch to reduce your import tax liability.

RETURNS: You'll have 14 days from the date of delivery to initiate a return through Chrono24 for a full refund of the purchase price. All returns must be received in the same condition as which they were shipped. The cost of return shipping, including any shipping insurance, packaging material, etc. is the responsibility of the person returning the watch.

Thank you!

Up for grabs is a lovely “serif” Rolex Submariner Ref. 5513, circa 1974 (4.2m serial). The “serif” dials were the 3rd iteration (after the “meters first” dial and the “non-serif” dial) of Rolex Submariner models to feature a “matte” dial, produced through the 1970s. This Rolex Submariner is in great condition. The case has been previously polished, but the lugs remain thick and even, with original beveled edges visible. The dial is flawless, with no chips, scratches, tool marks, etc. The original tritium lume is present on the dial and hands, aged to a beautiful yellow color. The original MK3 bezel insert is in good condition, with minimal wear.

Lastly, this Submariner comes on its a Rolex Oyster 93150 braceclet, with correct 580 endlinks, and has 11 full links with virtually no stretch.

This watch is used but in exceptional condition, ready to ship, and will come with the original Rolex box when purchased. For its age, the jubilee bracelet is in good shape with an obvious stretch as seen in the photo gallery.

All of our watches are 100% guaranteed authentic.

Every watch in our collection goes through a rigorous multipoint inspection to ensure authenticity. If need be, our timepieces are carefully serviced and detailed with only authentic original parts from the manufacturer.

We are also accepting trade-ins or offer you a cash value for your timepiece. Please be prepared with an estimate of how much you would want to get for your watch. We will inform you if we are interested ONLY after giving us your estimate. We will not make an offer before you inform us of your own estimate. Our offers are subject to change at any time.


SHIPPING

We ship all of our watches via FedEx and we recommend that the item be shipped to FedEx Ship Centers for pick up for security reasons. Valid ID and signatures are required to receive/pick up the package. We use FedEx Overnight for domestic shipping.

Our shipments come with insurance and is included in the price listed. Please allow us between 48-72 business hours to ship your order from the point of payment confirmation by Chrono24.

For international shipping, we use FedEx Global Services. Estimated time of arrival may vary based on the buyer’s location. All international customers are responsible for shipping cost, and all other fees such as customs and import taxes and/or duties of the receiving country. We will not ship the item to you if our insurance does not cover shipping to your country.


PAYMENT

Payment has to go through Chrono24 Trusted Checkout. We can only hold the watch upon confirmed payment.


RETURNS/REFUNDS:

Item(s) is/are eligible for return/refund within 7 days from the date the package is delivered. All merchandise returned will be thoroughly inspected for any signs of wear and tear or any damages. Any signs of wear and tear or damages will adversely affect customer refund. Please note that refunds are issued to the original method of payment used upon purchase.

In an unexpected and very unlikely event that a return package becomes missing during transit, insurance claims will be processed and only when insurance claims come to a completion that a refund will be made or issued.


WARRANTY

Our company provides a 1-year Warranty for pre-owned watches. The warranty only covers manufacturer’s parts which existed in the movement at the time of the sale and shall be voided if altered subsequent to the sales. All timepieces are previously purchased, even if it is listed as new or unworn.


OFFERS

We turned on “Price Suggestions” in all of our listings and only reasonable offers will be accepted. We pride ourselves in providing the most competitive prices in the market. We welcome all offers and will do our best to provide further discounts whenever we can.

**For any further questions please inquire for details**


PHOTOGRAPHS

All photographs presented in this listing truly represent the model of the watch that is for sale. However, we would like to inform our valued customers that because of fast turnover of timepieces, it's difficult for us to produce high-quality pictures for every single watch in our inventory. As a result, the timepiece you would receive might not be the exact one shown in the listing but rest assured it will be of the same model and quality.

The photographs showcased in this listing are captured by our team. We hold full rights to these images and kindly request that they should not be used without our clear permission. Each photo represents a significant investment of time, energy and effort, and we take a great sense of achievement in their extraordinary quality.

We appreciate your understanding and are committed as always to ensuring that every timepiece we send out meets or exceeds the highest standards of quality and authenticity.


ABOUT US:

We are an independent watch dealer who has been in the watch buying/selling business for over 30 years. Specializing in famous top brand names such as: Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, Vacheron Constantin, Panerai, and selections of Richard Mille watches. Our expertise, knowledge and love for watches have created us a worldwide customer base of luxury watch enthusiasts. Note that we are not affiliated with nor an authorized dealer for the above mentioned brand(s), as well as any other watch brands and companies. Our watches are acquired from Reputable, Legitimate, Trustworthy sources who deal directly with authorized dealers and distributors.

A classic and collectible configuration that represents an important era in Daytona history.

SHIPPING

We offer free overnight Insured FedEx Express Shipping. Items are usually shipped out 48-72 hours after payment is made and can be sooner if requested.

Chrono24 subjects all purchases made in America to its state’s applicable sales tax. That amount will be determined once you make your order.
International Purchases take 2-4 business days to prepare for the shipment manifest. NOTE: We cannot ship to all countries, please message us to see if your company qualifies for shipment. All shipments out of USA are subject to Custom taxes/duties. NO EXCEPTIONS

WARRANTY

All our watches are backed by our 1 Year Warranty on the movement of the watch. This warranty does not cover loss, theft, or any self-imposed damage to the watch. For example, water damage or dropping your watch and any damage deemed from that is not included in the warranty.

OFFERS

We have Price Suggestions turned on for all our listings. Even though the option may be available, and we do welcome all offers, we usually price all our watches to the best that our margins allow. We are usually competitive to the market, so our prices are updated weekly and sometimes even daily on certain pieces. Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions about that.

TIMEPIECE GUARANTEE

Before we ship out any timepiece that you order, all our watches are inspected to make sure all parts are original, and the watch is working correctly. If there are any parts that are unoriginal and can be proven as such, you are entitled to a full money back guarantee within a 7-day time Frame. Also, all the photos used in our listings are taken in-house and are of the actual timepiece being purchased.
Payments are accepted through chrono24 escrow service. Credit card and Wire transfer are the two payment options

CUSTOMER SATISFACTION

With many years in the business, we are truly blessed and honored to receive many 5 Star reviews as we always go the extra mile in making sure our customers are always left satisfied with their purchase from us. Please sit back and enjoy the smooth and luxurious experience that we will provide.

We are not authorized dealers for any watch brands that are listed here on Chrono24.

Please do not hesitate to contact us with any questions you might have. This can be done by clicking on "Contact Seller" under the Seller Information area.

Rolex Day-Date 36 - Ref. 18238
18K Yellow Gold | White Roman Dial | President Bracelet

Offered for sale is a Rolex Day-Date 36 (Ref. 18238), crafted entirely in solid 18K yellow gold. Known as the “President,” the Day-Date remains one of Rolex’s most iconic and prestigious models, recognized for its timeless design and signature day and date display.

The 36mm case is fitted with a fluted bezel in 18K yellow gold, giving the watch a classic and distinguished presence. The white dial with applied Roman numerals offers a clean and elegant aesthetic, complemented by the day display at 12 o’clock and date window at 3 o’clock.

The watch is mounted on the iconic President bracelet in solid 18K yellow gold, delivering both comfort and unmistakable luxury.

Powered by Rolex’s Caliber 3155 automatic movement, this reference is known for its reliability and the introduction of the double quickset function for both day and date adjustment.

The Rolex Day-Date 40 228238 is the ultimate symbol of prestige and refinement. Crafted entirely from solid 18k yellow gold, this timepiece represents the pinnacle of Rolex craftsmanship and timeless design.

The watch features a stunning factory diamond dial, where each diamond hour marker is meticulously set by Rolex’s in-house gem specialists. The brilliance of the diamonds contrasts beautifully with the warm tone of the yellow gold, creating a look that is both powerful and elegant.

At 12 o’clock sits the day window, fully spelling out the day of the week — one of the Day-Date’s most iconic features since its debut in 1956. The Cyclops lens over the date at 3 o’clock enhances legibility while maintaining the classic Rolex aesthetic.

Powered by the Rolex Caliber 3255, this next-generation automatic movement offers a 70-hour power reserve and delivers exceptional precision, durability, and efficiency. The movement is a Superlative Chronometer, certified for accuracy exceeding standard chronometer requirements.

The watch is paired with the signature President bracelet, crafted in 18k yellow gold with semi-circular links that provide exceptional comfort and sophistication. The hidden Crownclasp ensures a seamless and secure fit on the wrist.

The Rolex Day-Date 40 228238 with factory diamond dial is more than a watch — it’s a statement of success and excellence. With its flawless proportions, luxurious materials, and enduring design, it remains one of the most distinguished timepieces in the Rolex collection.

The Rolex Datejust 41 Ref. 126333 is a perfect blend of luxury, style, and everyday wearability. Made in Rolesor—a mix of stainless steel and 18k yellow gold—it offers that classic Rolex look with just the right amount of shine and sophistication.

This version features a rich champagne dial set with factory diamond hour markers, giving it a warm, elegant appearance that looks great in any setting. The fluted 18k yellow gold bezel adds extra brilliance, while the Cyclops lens magnifies the date at 3 o’clock for easy reading.

Powered by the Rolex Caliber 3235 automatic movement, it delivers top-tier accuracy, a 70-hour power reserve, and Rolex’s Superlative Chronometer certification. The 41mm Oyster case is solid and water-resistant to 100 meters, making it both durable and practical for everyday use.

Completing the look is the classic Jubilee bracelet, crafted from stainless steel and yellow gold for comfort and a refined finish.

The Rolex Datejust 41 126333 with Champagne Diamond Dial is a statement piece that perfectly balances luxury and versatility—ideal for those who want a watch that looks as good in the boardroom as it does on a night out.

This model has Bright blue dial with a fine sunray and highly legible Chromalight display with long-lasting blue luminescence. The watch is mechanical self-winding Manufacture Rolex 3235 contains 31 Jewels and has an approximate power reserve of 70 hours of power reserve. This model presented on Stainless Steel Jubilee bracelet of brushed outer links and polished center links with a Folding Oysterlock safety clasp with Easylink 5 mm comfort extension link. For sale is a men’s vintage 1970 Rolex Datejust 36, model/reference 1603. The watch does not include its original box or papers and is not fitted with the original bracelet; it is currently on a non-Rolex two-piece leather strap. This is a non–quick-set Datejust.

The watch shows noticeable signs of age, as expected for a vintage piece. The dial and hands have spots, the acrylic crystal has scratches and scuffs, and the case and bezel display scratches and small dents throughout. Due to its age, the watch is no longer water resistant and should be kept away from moisture.

We serviced this watch in-house in 03/2026 as part of a routine preventative overhaul; it was not broken and did not require any repairs. During the service, we fully disassembled the movement, cleaned it, properly lubricated it, reassembled it, and then timed and adjusted it to ensure it is running as it should. It is currently running very well, keeping accurate time, and functioning exactly as it should with no issues. This watch comes with a 1-year warranty through our shop.

Sizing: 36mm diameter, 43.1mm lug-to-lug, 20mm lug width, and 12.3mm case thickness.

Features: Stainless steel case and bezel, acrylic crystal, screw-down crown, screw-down case back, and powered by a Rolex Caliber 1570 automatic movement with 26 jewels.

This Rolex GMT-Master II 116710LN has been elevated beyond its standard configuration with a series of carefully chosen upgrades. The factory black dial has been replaced with a dark gray meteorite dial, each naturally patterned with cosmic textures that ensure individuality. The bezel insert has been reimagined in a black and gray “Bruce Wayne” style, offering a sleek two-tone contrast. Completing the redesign is a Jubilee-style bracelet that brings added refinement and comfort compared to the original Oyster.

Every element has been selected to create a cohesive, striking interpretation of the GMT-Master II—maintaining Rolex’s robust core while offering a distinctive identity for collectors seeking something set apart from traditional examples.

This watch presents in excellent condition, with little to no signs of wear. Please reference the photos for the most accurate representation of the condition of the watch. We do our best to emphasize, rather than diminish any flaws through our macro photography.

This timepiece comes with its outer box, inner box, booklets, green tag, warranty card, original Oyster bracelet, original black bezel insert, original green handset and original black dial so it can be converted back at any time.

This timepiece is covered by our five-year warranty from the date of purchase against mechanical defects, offering added peace of mind when purchasing a bespoke Rolex.

Rolex No-date SubMariner Reference#5513

The Rolex Submariner 5513 from 1989 represents one of the most iconic expressions of Rolex’s classic dive watch heritage. Produced for decades with only subtle refinements, the reference 5513 embodies timeless tool-watch design with its clean, no-date dial layout, luminous hour markers, and signature Mercedes hands for optimal underwater legibility. The 40mm stainless steel Oyster case delivers robust water resistance and durability, while the unidirectional rotating bezel provides precise dive timing functionality. Late-production examples from 1989 often feature glossy black dials with white gold surrounds on the hour markers, offering a transitional aesthetic that bridges vintage charm and modern refinement. Powered by the reliable automatic caliber 1520 movement, the Submariner 5513 is celebrated for its simplicity, ruggedness, and historical significance among collectors. With its balanced proportions and understated versatility, this reference remains a highly sought-after piece that captures the essence of Rolex’s professional watchmaking legacy.

The Rolex Oyster Royal line represents some of the brand’s most straightforward and functional designs from the mid century period. Produced as a time only watch without automatic winding or additional complications, the reference 6426 reflects Rolex’s focus on reliability and everyday wearability.

This model features the Oyster case, which had already established itself as a benchmark for durability and water resistance by the 1960s. Paired with a manual wind movement, the watch offers a more direct and mechanical experience compared to its automatic counterparts.

What makes this example particularly interesting is the dial. Originally a silver sunburst finish, it has aged into a tropical speckled surface that gives the watch a completely unique character. Combined with the non luminous configuration and sword hands, the overall look stays clean and very balanced while still offering strong visual interest.

This is the kind of Rolex that feels understated until you really spend time with it. The absence of lume keeps the dial very clean, and the tropical aging adds just enough personality without overwhelming the design.

The proportions are classic and wearable, and on a simple leather strap, it becomes an easy daily piece. It has that quiet vintage presence that works just as well dressed up as it does casually.

Every watch is thoroughly vetted, carefully described with complete transparency, and guaranteed authentic. Each piece is offered in honest condition, ensuring collectors receive a timepiece that reflects both originality and integrity.

The Rolex reference 9522 is part of a lesser seen group of manually wound dress watches that showcase a more experimental side of the brand’s mid century design language. Often referred to as “Disco Volante,” or flying saucer, the case is defined by its wide, rounded profile and thin midsection, giving it a distinctive silhouette that stands apart from traditional Oyster cases.

Produced during a period when Rolex was still exploring a range of dress watch designs, the 9522 reflects a balance between form and function. While it retains the brand’s focus on durability and precision, the emphasis here is clearly on case architecture and dial presence.

This example features a grey dial that has aged into a tropical taupe tone, creating a soft, almost brown hue that adds depth without overpowering the simplicity of the layout. Combined with the small seconds register and minimal text, the watch maintains a very clean and refined appearance.

The case is what immediately draws attention. At 36mm with that wide, sloping profile, it wears larger than expected and has a strong presence on the wrist.

The tropical dial really completes the watch. It brings warmth to what would otherwise be a very minimal design, and the aging feels natural and even. It is the kind of piece that feels subtle at first but becomes more interesting the longer you look at it.

Every watch is thoroughly vetted, carefully described with complete transparency, and guaranteed authentic. Each piece is offered in honest condition, ensuring collectors receive a timepiece that reflects both originality and integrity.

The iconic Rolex GMT-Master II "Pepsi" Ref. 126710BLRO is here. This legendary timepiece showcases one of horology's most beloved color combinations with its striking red and blue Cerachrom ceramic bezel that has captivated collectors and travelers for generations.

The robust 40mm Oystersteel case provides the perfect foundation for the mesmerizing "Pepsi" bezel insert, where vibrant red transitions seamlessly into deep blue—colors that have become synonymous with GMT-Master heritage since the 1950s. The pristine black dial features applied Chromalight hour markers and the distinctive red GMT hand, ensuring exceptional legibility while maintaining the classic aesthetic that defines this collection.

This particular configuration pairs beautifully with the celebrated five-piece link Jubilee bracelet, offering refined comfort and flexibility that drapes elegantly around the wrist. The Oysterclasp with Easylink extension system provides secure wear with quick 5mm adjustment capability for changing conditions throughout your travels.
Powered by Rolex's exceptional caliber 3285 movement with 70-hour power reserve and Superlative Chronometer certification, this GMT-Master II delivers the legendary reliability expected from the Crown while serving dual time zones with mechanical precision that has made it the ultimate pilot's companion.

For the discerning collector seeking a timepiece that combines travel functionality with timeless design heritage, this "Pepsi" on Jubilee represents one of the most coveted and recognizable configurations in the entire Rolex catalog.

Rolex SubMariner Reference#5513 1978!! LAST YEAR OF PRODUCTION

The Rolex Submariner reference 5513 from 1978 represents the final year of production for one of the brand’s most iconic and longest-running professional dive watches. Introduced in 1962, the 5513 remained in production for over 15 years, and the 1978 examples showcase the most evolved form of the reference. This model features a 40 mm stainless steel Oyster case with a unidirectional aluminum bezel insert and a matte black “Maxi” dial with tritium luminous hour markers, prized today for their warm patina. Powered by Rolex’s caliber 1520 automatic movement, the 5513 is a non-chronometer-certified Submariner, distinguished by its clean two-line dial. It is fitted with an acrylic crystal and screw-down crown, ensuring the classic 200-meter water resistance. As the last year before discontinuation, the 1978 Submariner 5513 holds special appeal among collectors, blending vintage character with proven Rolex durability and timeless design.


LOOK AT THE DIAL AND HANDS!!! AMAZING PATINA

Inside, the 5513 houses a reliable automatic movement built for precision. Although it lacks a date function, its simplicity adds to the watch’s classic appeal. Furthermore, the Submariner 5513 carries historical significance as a staple of Rolex’s professional dive watch line since the 1960s.

The iconic design, sturdy construction, and vintage charm make the Rolex Submariner Stainless Steel Black Dial 5513 highly collectible. Therefore, it remains a must-have for anyone seeking heritage, functionality, and lasting investment value.

If you boil Rolex down to its purest form, what do you get?

The Rolex Oyster Perpetual. This is truly the genesis for the entire Rolex brand. The very first Rolex models were called ‘Oysters’ which was owed to their innovative three part case that all screwed into each-other. That is where the fluted bezel actually derives from, being screwed down into the top of the case to secure the crystal with a gasket - as well as the grooves on the oyster case back. All makes sense now - right?

The piece that we have here, simply known as an Oyster Perpetual Date, is a descendant of those early watches, utilizing a water-resistant Oyster case, an automatic-winding movement, and a date complication. A functional, sturdy, and dependable timekeeping device.

Dating to circa 1970, this Reference 1500 features a 35mm Oyster case with a smooth steel bezel and a period-correct 'rivet' Oyster bracelet with a blade clasp. The case, bezel and bracelet all show normal signs of wear throughout. The dial within this piece is the real highlight here. The once glossy black dial had changed to an absolutely stunning, rich brown color throughout. The patina is so uniform it looks almost intentional. The Tritium plots remain fully-intact and also exhibit a uniform patina throughout and the handset matches beautifully.

The Oyster Perpetual line presents great value next to its slightly larger Datejust siblings, while simultaneously representing the essence of Rolex.

You could say that this example, with its's stunning dial and excellent overall condition, is exceptional value relative to its siblings from the Professional or an equivalent Day-Date.

Rolex No-date SubMariner Reference#5513

The Rolex Submariner 5513 from 1989 represents one of the most iconic expressions of Rolex’s classic dive watch heritage. Produced for decades with only subtle refinements, the reference 5513 embodies timeless tool-watch design with its clean, no-date dial layout, luminous hour markers, and signature Mercedes hands for optimal underwater legibility. The 40mm stainless steel Oyster case delivers robust water resistance and durability, while the unidirectional rotating bezel provides precise dive timing functionality. Late-production examples from 1989 often feature glossy black dials with white gold surrounds on the hour markers, offering a transitional aesthetic that bridges vintage charm and modern refinement. Powered by the reliable automatic caliber 1520 movement, the Submariner 5513 is celebrated for its simplicity, ruggedness, and historical significance among collectors. With its balanced proportions and understated versatility, this reference remains a highly sought-after piece that captures the essence of Rolex’s professional watchmaking legacy.

The Rolex GMT-Master II 126713GRNR, nicknamed the “Bruce Wayne,” is one of the newest and most refined additions to Rolex’s GMT lineup. Crafted in stainless steel and 18k yellow gold, this stunning two-tone timepiece delivers the perfect balance of sporty elegance and travel-ready functionality.

The black and grey Cerachrom ceramic bezel gives the watch a sleek, modern contrast — a fresh look that stands apart from the classic Batman or Root Beer editions. Its 24-hour bi-directional bezel and GMT hand allow tracking of a second time zone, making it ideal for frequent travelers.

The black dial is pure sophistication, featuring luminous Chromalight hour markers and gold accents that add warmth and depth to its appearance. The signature Cyclops lens magnifies the date at 3 o’clock, a hallmark of Rolex design.

Powered by the Rolex Caliber 3285, the watch offers a 70-hour power reserve and Superlative Chronometer certification, ensuring exceptional precision and durability. The Oyster case is water-resistant to 100 meters, built for both adventure and everyday wear.

This model comes on the elegant Oyster bracelet, crafted from stainless steel and yellow gold, complete with the Oysterlock safety clasp and Easylink extension system for easy adjustments.

Offered here as a Full Set with original box and papers, the Rolex GMT-Master II 126713GRNR “Bruce Wayne” combines cutting-edge technology with timeless style — a modern classic that represents the evolution of the GMT legend.

This listing is for a Rolex Sky-Dweller, reference 336938, offered in unworn condition and as a complete set with original box and papers. This reference is crafted entirely from solid 18k yellow gold and features a 42mm Oyster case with Rolex’s signature fluted bezel, delivering substantial presence and unmistakable luxury.

The watch features a black dial with applied hour markers and Rolex hands filled with Chromalight luminous material for exceptional readability. The Sky-Dweller’s innovative layout includes an off-center 24-hour disc for tracking a second time zone, while the annual calendar displays the month through subtle apertures positioned around the dial and the date at 3 o’clock. The fluted bezel functions as part of Rolex’s Ring Command system, allowing intuitive adjustment of all calendar and time-zone settings.

Powering the watch is the Rolex Caliber 9002 automatic movement, incorporating the Chronergy escapement, Paraflex shock absorbers, and Parachrom hairspring for outstanding precision, efficiency, and reliability. The movement is certified as a Superlative Chronometer, tested to −2/+2 seconds per day.

The watch is fitted with a solid 18k yellow gold Oyster bracelet featuring the Oysterclasp and Easylink comfort extension system for a secure and adjustable fit. With 100 meters of water resistance, the Sky-Dweller is engineered for both daily wear and global travel.

An exceptional example of Rolex’s most complicated annual-calendar model, highly desirable in unworn condition and complete set configuration.

You may receive a watch that has been wrapped in plastic by us, to prevent scratches during transit. Bezel protectors, even if pictured, are not always included.

Shipping

We prefer to use the Fedex Hold-At-Location service, meaning we ship your watch to the Fedex Office or Ship Center nearest you, where you can pick it up upon arrival. All of our shipments are insured and shipped Priority Overnight.

International shipping to select countries is done via Fedex International Priority shipping. Please be aware of all appropriate customs and import taxes you may incur. Failure to accept an international package will result in restocking fees on a case-by-case basis. We will ship to the nearest Fedex Ship Center to you, and you can pickup the package at your convenience.

In Person Showings

For safety reasons, we do not encourage in person showings or browsing. All of our operations are online and we deliver via Fedex Priority Overnight.

Trades

We happily take trades of Rolex, Omega, Audemars Piguet, Patek Philippe and most major brands towards any of our listed watches. If you wish to trade in your watch, please send photos and relevant information in your initial message, along with your desired trade value. Our offer for your watch is not binding and is subject to change or revocation. We process all of our trades via insured Fedex Priority Overnight shipping; we ship the watch you are receiving after we receive your watch and the appropriate cleared payment, if a balance is due to us. 

Price Suggestions

We may have Price Suggestions enabled on some of our listings; this does not mean we are obligated to negotiate on these listings nor provide price reductions. 

Payment

Payment is accepted through Chrono24 Trusted Checkout. We cannot hold watches for longer than 24 hours without proof of payment / payment confirmation. Please submit payment for your watch as soon as your order is confirmed to avoid delays and order cancellation.

All purchases are subject to the sales tax rate of your shipping address.

Returns

We offer a 100% Money Back Guarantee on all of our watches! Feel free to shop with confidence. You have 14 days to return your item. Watches must be in the exact same condition as they were shipped, not sized or altered in any way. If watches are not returned in the same condition, restocking fees may apply.

Up for grabs is a lovely “serif” Rolex Submariner Ref. 5513, circa 1974 (4.2m serial). The “serif” dials were the 3rd iteration (after the “meters first” dial and the “non-serif” dial) of Rolex Submariner models to feature a “matte” dial, produced through the 1970s. This Rolex Submariner is in great condition. The case has been previously polished, but the lugs remain thick and even, with original beveled edges visible. The dial is flawless, with no chips, scratches, tool marks, etc. The original tritium lume is present on the dial and hands, aged to a beautiful yellow color. The original MK3 bezel insert is in good condition, with minimal wear.

Lastly, this Submariner comes on its a Rolex Oyster 93150 braceclet, with correct 580 endlinks, and has 11 full links with virtually no stretch.

PLEASE READ OUR GUIDELINES BELOW!

For safety reasons and to minimize risk of shipping loss, we must ship to Fedex Office or Ship Centers, where you can pick up your watch at your convenience. Please use the nearest Fedex Office or Ship Center as your shipping address on your order; this will prevent further delays for address changes. We will ensure the address is correct prior to confirming your order; do not worry.

Feel free to message us with any questions! If there is no Fedex Center near you, please use your home address as your shipping address and we will ensure we find an appropriate solution. Residential deliveries are still possible.

ROLEX Watches: All Rolex watches sold by us come with the Original Box, Green Chronometer Tag, booklets, and Warranty Card (if stated that “papers” are included in the listing information). The Warranty Card will be named and dated if applicable. Stickers will have been removed at the time of purchase from the Authorized Rolex Dealer, unless otherwise stated. The watch may be sized from the time of purchase however it has never been worn (if condition stated as “Unworn/New”) and comes with all standard links that come on Rolex Bracelet models. It may also come with the white serial tag, but that is not guaranteed as some Authorized Dealers keep the tag. Because we often stock several of the same model watch, even if the watch is pictured with the white serial tag, it is not guaranteed to come with it. The watch may also be newer than the noted on our listing. If we list as a 2021 Unworn, you may receive a 2022 Unworn. It is possible that the pictured watch in the ad has “stickers” on the watch, but you will receive a watch with stickers removed unless otherwise stated in the listing. You may receive a watch that has been wrapped in plastic by us, to prevent scratches during transit. Bezel protectors, even if pictured, are not always included.

Shipping

We prefer to use the Fedex Hold-At-Location service, meaning we ship your watch to the Fedex Office or Ship Center nearest you, where you can pick it up upon arrival. All of our shipments are insured and shipped Priority Overnight.

International shipping to select countries is done via Fedex International Priority shipping. Please be aware of all appropriate customs and import taxes you may incur. Failure to accept an international package will result in restocking fees on a case-by-case basis. We will ship to the nearest Fedex Ship Center to you, and you can pickup the package at your convenience.

In Person Showings

For safety reasons, we do not encourage in person showings or browsing. All of our operations are online and we deliver via Fedex Priority Overnight.

Trades

We happily take trades of Rolex, Omega, Audemars Piguet, Patek Philippe and most major brands towards any of our listed watches. If you wish to trade in your watch, please send photos and relevant information in your initial message, along with your desired trade value. Our offer for your watch is not binding and is subject to change or revocation. We process all of our trades via insured Fedex Priority Overnight shipping; we ship the watch you are receiving after we receive your watch and the appropriate cleared payment, if a balance is due to us. 

Price Suggestions

We may have Price Suggestions enabled on some of our listings; this does not mean we are obligated to negotiate on these listings nor provide price reductions. 

Payment

Payment is accepted through Chrono24 Trusted Checkout. We cannot hold watches for longer than 24 hours without proof of payment / payment confirmation. Please submit payment for your watch as soon as your order is confirmed to avoid delays and order cancellation.

All purchases are subject to the sales tax rate of your shipping address.

Returns

We offer a 100% Money Back Guarantee on all of our watches! Feel free to shop with confidence. You have 14 days to return your item. Watches must be in the exact same condition as they were shipped, not sized or altered in any way. If watches are not returned in the same condition, restocking fees may apply.

About

The Rolex Yacht-Master 37 Rolesium with a Grey Dial blends refined luxury with exceptional performance. Rolex designed this model for collectors who value elegance and precision. Its compact 37mm case offers perfect proportions for many wrists. The case features rugged Oystersteel, which resists corrosion and daily wear. Rolex pairs the case with a smooth platinum bezel that enhances its luxurious presence.

The Rolesium construction sets this watch apart. This blend offers both strength and beauty. The slate dial adds depth with its sunburst pattern. Each light shift reveals subtle changes in tone and texture. Chromalight markers ensure strong visibility in low light. The date window adds useful functionality while keeping the design clean.

The watch houses the reliable Caliber 2236. The self-winding design offers effortless performance every day. The Oyster bracelet provides comfort and durability. Its Easylink extension allows fast adjustments on the wrist.

This model carries strong historical significance. The Yacht-Master line pays tribute to Rolex’s long connection with sailing culture. The 37mm variant brings that heritage to a versatile size.

Collectors admire this watch for its rare Rolesium finish and timeless style. Enthusiasts value its precision and durability. The Rolex Yacht-Master remains a standout choice for anyone seeking luxury with purpose.

About

The Rolex Day-Date President Complications Yellow Gold with a Champagne Stick Dial defines timeless prestige and classic Rolex craftsmanship. Introduced in 1956, the Day-Date became the first wristwatch to display both the date and the full day of the week. This innovation quickly made it a symbol of success and influence.

Crafted from solid 18k yellow gold, the 36mm case offers enduring luxury and balanced proportions. The matching President bracelet delivers exceptional comfort and an unmistakable presence on the wrist. Its champagne stick dial enhances the watch with warm tones and clean, elegant hour markers. The acrylic crystal adds vintage character that collectors deeply appreciate.

The automatic movement inside ensures reliable timekeeping and smooth daily wear. The fluted bezel reflects light beautifully, reinforcing its refined aesthetic. This reference remains highly sought after for its heritage and iconic design.

The watch stands apart with its historical importance and classic styling. Collectors value its legacy, while enthusiasts admire its understated elegance. The Rolex Day-Date President Complications remains a true cornerstone of luxury watchmaking.

An iconic and timeless vintage two tone Rolex Submariner featuring a blue dial and matching blue bezel. The stainless steel and 18k yellow gold Submariner has model number 16613 and has an E serial number dating the production of the watch to 1990. The watch has its original Rolex box. The watch is all original.

The watch case measures 40 mm across excluding the crown. The unidirectional bezel is made of 18K yellow gold and is equipped with an aluminum blue insert.

The dial is a metallic blue color, with purple highlights in different lighting. The dial is protected by a scratch resistant sapphire crystal. The crystal has a cyclops magnifier for the date function at 3 o'clock.

The bracelet is two tone stainless steel and yellow gold. The bracelet is oyster style with a stainless steel deployant buckle. The buckle has the divers extension link to fit over a wet suit. The watch has 12 links and 2 end links and will fit up to a 7.75 inch wrist with ease. The bracelet has very little sag.

The watch is in excellent condition with noteable signs of wear on the blue bezel insert. The insert can be replaced for a $150 charge. The replacement insert is original Rolex. The case is in excellent condition with no dents or dings.

The watch has been tested by machine for accuracy and water resistance passing to Rolex standards.

About

The Rolex Datejust 31 Stainless Steel and White Gold with a Dark Grey VI Diamond Dial captures timeless elegance with modern refinement. This model blends classic Rolex design with elevated materials and striking details. The 31mm Oyster case combines durable stainless steel with an 18k white gold diamond bezel, delivering both strength and luxury.

The dark grey dial sets this watch apart with a rich, contemporary tone. Roman numeral hour markers are enhanced with diamond accents, adding brilliance without overwhelming the design. This unique dial configuration creates a sophisticated balance of tradition and modern style. The iconic Cyclops lens magnifies the date, ensuring clear readability at a glance.

Inside, the watch features a precise Rolex automatic movement, known for reliability and smooth performance. The Oyster bracelet provides comfort and durability for daily wear. Originally introduced in 1945, the Datejust line remains a cornerstone of Rolex innovation and prestige.

The watch stands out for its refined details and versatile size. Collectors value its distinctive dial and precious materials. The Rolex Datejust offers a perfect blend of heritage, luxury, and everyday sophistication.

This is the Rolex Datejust OysterQuartz ref. 17000. It is one of the most distinctive and undervalued references Rolex ever produced. A bold departure from the typical Datejust styling cues, this example wears the clean silver baton tritium dial in its original, unrestored state, presented honestly with light signs of age and wear consistent with a nearly 50-year-old watch that has actually been appreciated.

The integrated angular bracelet and sharply faceted case remain one of the most architecturally interesting designs Rolex has ever put out — ahead of its time in the late 70s and increasingly appreciated by collectors today. 5.6M serial dates production to 1978.

About

The Rolex Datejust Stainless Steel and White Gold with a Bronze VI Diamond Dial blends timeless elegance with refined luxury. This model stands out with its rare bronze-toned dial, offering a warm and distinctive aesthetic. Diamond hour markers elevate the design, adding brilliance and a sophisticated presence.

The 31mm case combines durable stainless steel with an 18k white gold bezel. The diamond bezel reflects light beautifully, enhancing the watch’s signature Rolex identity. Its compact size offers versatile wear while maintaining a strong visual impact. The bracelet delivers both comfort and enduring strength for daily use.

The watch runs on a precise automatic movement. This ensures reliable timekeeping and long-term performance. The Datejust line, introduced in 1945, revolutionized watchmaking with its automatic date function. This legacy continues in every modern reference.

Collectors value the Rolex Datejust for its unique dial and refined materials. Its balance of innovation and tradition makes it highly desirable. This timepiece offers both everyday elegance and lasting investment appeal.

Rolex Air-King – Reference 116900

The Rolex Air-King reference 116900 is a modern interpretation of one of Rolex’s most historic aviation watches. Crafted in robust Oystersteel, this 40mm timepiece features a smooth bezel and a distinctive black dial inspired by cockpit instruments, highlighted by bold white Arabic numerals and signature green and yellow Rolex accents.

Powered by the Rolex Caliber 3131 automatic movement, the Air-King delivers exceptional precision, reliability, and resistance to magnetic fields thanks to its soft iron inner case. The scratch-resistant sapphire crystal and solid Oyster bracelet with Oysterclasp ensure durability and everyday comfort.

Sporty yet refined, the Air-King 116900 is a versatile watch that bridges Rolex heritage with contemporary design—equally at home in casual or professional settings.

The Rolex Oyster Perpetual is the foundational pillar of the brand, combining the two most significant innovations in horological history: the waterproof Oyster case and the self-winding Perpetual movement. The name “Oyster Perpetual” was officially codified to represent the union of these two technologies in a single, cohesive model.



At hand we have a lovely early 1960s reference 1002, presented in a 34 mm 18k yellow gold execution with a smooth bezel, all in beautiful condition.



A particularly charming and unique detail is the engraving on the case back: “1937–1962 Coca-Cola” commemorating the 25-year jubilee of Mr. H. Kirchfeld for the German branch of the Coca-Cola Company. This gives the piece a wonderful sense of history and an added layer of character.



The dial is equally attractive, featuring a warm silver soleil finish, elegant hour markers, a “Swiss” only designation at six o’clock, and fine dauphine hands. Fitted with a leather strap with a Rolex plaque buckle, and fully serviced, this elegant dress watch is ready to be enjoyed for many years to come.



This really is what watch collecting is about, finding the rare ones in good condition with a great story . Please do not hesitate to ask us about it. We are glad to help!



Specifications:



Rolex Reference 1002

34mm 18k Yellow Gold Case

Smooth Bezel

Serial 712xxx dating to 1961

Silver soleil “Swiss” only dial, dauphine hands

“1937–1962 Coca-Cola” engraved case back for 25 years jubilee of employee

Rolex Plaque buckle attached

Fully serviced by our watchmaker

One-year mechanical warranty

Free worldwide FedEx Priority shipping

This Rolex GMT-Master II 126720VTNR is a first left-handed (destro) model in the brand's extensive catalog. It features bidirectional rotating green and black ceramic bezel, and because of these colors, the "Sprite" nickname was born. The green GMT hand creates perfect contrast against the black dial. The 40mm case with the screwdown crown makes the watch water-resistant up to 100 meters. It's also shock-resistant, ensuring it can withstand daily wear and tear.

This timepiece comes as a full set in the MINT preowned condition on oyster bracelet. The clasp and the caseback still retain original stickers. The warranty card is dated 06/22/2023, providing the remainder of the 5-year manufacturer's warranty until 06/2028. The green and white hangtags, bezel protector, wallet with warranty booklet and instructions manual, inner and outer boxes, and the sleeve complete the set.

A 1983 Datejust Reference 16000 in good, worn condition with a magnificent dial. As mentioned before, the combination of a smooth steel bezel and a Jubilee bracelet is one of the most beautiful pairings—here, it’s even more stunning with a light gray Buckley dial.

The watch’s case is in good condition. Sharp edges, thick lugs, and satin-finished or polished where appropriate. There is slight corrosion between the lugs at 6 o’clock and on the upper right lug. The highlight is certainly the light gray color of the Buckley dial, which gives the watch an incredibly unique character. The Jubilee bracelet, which matches the watch’s vintage, shows age-related stretch.

The watch has been fully serviced by our atelier and comes with a 1 year warranty.

El bisel giratorio del Submariner es una característica fundamental de este reloj. Sus graduaciones de 60 minutos permiten controlar con seguridad y precisión el tiempo de inmersión y las paradas de descompresión.

Manufacturado por Rolex a partir de aluminio y resistente a la corrosión. La sustancia luminiscente en el cero del bisel presenta un tono lijeramente envejecido que le da un atractivo especial al reloj. El canto estriado del bisel ha sido diseñado cuidadosamente con el fin de ofrecer un excelente agarre bajo el agua, incluso con los guantes puestos.
Rolex utiliza acero Oystersteel para las cajas de acero de sus relojes. Especialmente desarrollado por Rolex, el acero Oystersteel pertenece a la familia del acero 904L, las aleaciones más utilizadas en la alta tecnología y en las industrias química y aeroespacial, en las que la resistencia a la corrosión es esencial.

El acero Oystersteel es extremadamente resistente, ofrece un acabado excepcional al ser pulido y conserva su belleza incluso en las condiciones más extremas.

Offered for sale is a highly sought-after Rolex Cosmograph Daytona Ref. 116500LN, featuring the iconic white “Panda” dial and black Cerachrom ceramic bezel. Dated 2016, this example is from the early production period of this reference, making it particularly appealing to collectors.
The 40mm Oystersteel case is paired with a matching Oyster bracelet, combining durability with timeless sport elegance. The crisp white dial with contrasting black sub-dials gives the watch its famous “Panda” nickname and ensures excellent legibility, while the ceramic bezel adds both scratch resistance and a modern aesthetic.
Powered by Rolex’s in-house calibre 4130 automatic chronograph movement, the Daytona is renowned for its precision, robustness, and smooth operation thanks to its column wheel and vertical clutch system.
This watch is presented in very good condition, showing only light signs of wear consistent with careful use. It has been well maintained and is running accurately.
Originally sold in 2016, the watch comes as a complete full set, including original box, warranty card — an important factor for both collectors and long-term value.
The Daytona 116500LN “Panda” remains one of the most iconic and desirable modern Rolex sports models, with strong demand worldwide and enduring appeal among collectors.

Rolex Milgauss Ref. 116400GV – 2021 – Z-Blue Dial – Full Set – Excellent Condition

For sale is this stunning Rolex Milgauss Ref. 116400GV, dated 2021, presented in excellent overall condition and complete with its full original set.

This reference is one of Rolex’s most distinctive and technically innovative models, originally designed for scientists and engineers working in high magnetic environments. The Milgauss is capable of resisting magnetic fields up to 1,000 gauss, thanks to its internal Faraday cage, ensuring exceptional precision and reliability.

This example features the highly desirable Z-Blue dial, which shifts beautifully in different lighting conditions, paired with the iconic orange lightning-bolt seconds hand—a signature design element unique to the Milgauss line. The watch is further distinguished by its green-tinted sapphire crystal (Glace Verte), exclusive to this reference, adding a subtle yet unmistakable edge.

Mit ihrer markanten schwarz-blauen Cerachrom-Lünette und dem charakteristischen Jubilee-Band ist sie eine der gefragtesten Stahl-Sportmodelle aus dem Hause Rolex – modern, ikonisch und extrem wertstabil.

Das 40-mm-Oyster-Gehäuse aus robustem Oystersteel garantiert maximale Widerstandsfähigkeit im Alltag und bleibt dabei stets elegant am Handgelenk. Die zweifarbige Keramiklünette in Schwarz und Blau steht sinnbildlich für die zweite Zeitzone – ein Designmerkmal mit hohem Wiedererkennungswert.

Das tiefschwarze Zifferblatt mit Chromalight-Leuchtindizes sorgt für beste Ablesbarkeit bei Tag und Nacht. Der zusätzliche GMT-Zeiger ermöglicht das gleichzeitige Ablesen einer zweiten Zeitzone – ideal für Vielreisende oder internationale Geschäftsleute.

Im Inneren arbeitet das Rolex Manufakturkaliber 3285 mit einer Gangreserve von ca. 70 Stunden. Dank Chronometer-Zertifizierung (Superlative Chronometer) überzeugt die Uhr mit höchster Präzision und Zuverlässigkeit.

Das elegante Jubilee-Band mit Oysterlock-Sicherheitsfaltschließe und Easylink-Verlängerungssystem bietet optimalen Tragekomfort und unterstreicht den besonderen Charakter der „Batgirl“ im Vergleich zur Oyster-Band-Variante („Batman“).

PLEASE READ OUR GUIDELINES BELOW!

For safety reasons and to minimize risk of shipping loss, we must ship to Fedex Office or Ship Centers, where you can pick up your watch at your convenience. Please use the nearest Fedex Office or Ship Center as your shipping address on your order; this will prevent further delays for address changes. We will ensure the address is correct prior to confirming your order; do not worry.

Feel free to message us with any questions! If there is no Fedex Center near you, please use your home address as your shipping address and we will ensure we find an appropriate solution. Residential deliveries are still possible.

ROLEX Watches: All Rolex watches sold by us come with the Original Box, Green Chronometer Tag, booklets, and Warranty Card (if stated that “papers” are included in the listing information). The Warranty Card will be named and dated if applicable. Stickers will have been removed at the time of purchase from the Authorized Rolex Dealer, unless otherwise stated. The watch may be sized from the time of purchase however it has never been worn (if condition stated as “Unworn/New”) and comes with all standard links that come on Rolex Bracelet models. It may also come with the white serial tag, but that is not guaranteed as some Authorized Dealers keep the tag. Because we often stock several of the same model watch, even if the watch is pictured with the white serial tag, it is not guaranteed to come with it. The watch may also be newer than the noted on our listing. If we list as a 2021 Unworn, you may receive a 2022 Unworn. It is possible that the pictured watch in the ad has “stickers” on the watch, but you will receive a watch with stickers removed unless otherwise stated in the listing. You may receive a watch that has been wrapped in plastic by us, to prevent scratches during transit. Bezel protectors, even if pictured, are not always included.

Shipping

We prefer to use the Fedex Hold-At-Location service, meaning we ship your watch to the Fedex Office or Ship Center nearest you, where you can pick it up upon arrival. All of our shipments are insured and shipped Priority Overnight.

International shipping to select countries is done via Fedex International Priority shipping. Please be aware of all appropriate customs and import taxes you may incur. Failure to accept an international package will result in restocking fees on a case-by-case basis. We will ship to the nearest Fedex Ship Center to you, and you can pickup the package at your convenience.

In Person Showings

For safety reasons, we do not encourage in person showings or browsing. All of our operations are online and we deliver via Fedex Priority Overnight.

Trades

We happily take trades of Rolex, Omega, Audemars Piguet, Patek Philippe and most major brands towards any of our listed watches. If you wish to trade in your watch, please send photos and relevant information in your initial message, along with your desired trade value. Our offer for your watch is not binding and is subject to change or revocation. We process all of our trades via insured Fedex Priority Overnight shipping; we ship the watch you are receiving after we receive your watch and the appropriate cleared payment, if a balance is due to us.

Price Suggestions

We may have Price Suggestions enabled on some of our listings; this does not mean we are obligated to negotiate on these listings nor provide price reductions.

Payment

Payment is accepted through Chrono24 Trusted Checkout. We cannot hold watches for longer than 24 hours without proof of payment / payment confirmation. Please submit payment for your watch as soon as your order is confirmed to avoid delays and order cancellation.

All purchases are subject to the sales tax rate of your shipping address.

Returns

We offer a 100% Money Back Guarantee on all of our watches! Feel free to shop with confidence. You have 14 days to return your item. Watches must be in the exact same condition as they were shipped, not sized or altered in any way. If watches are not returned in the same condition, restocking fees may apply.

Up for grabs is a lovely “serif” Rolex Submariner Ref. 5513, circa 1974 (4.2m serial). The “serif” dials were the 3rd iteration (after the “meters first” dial and the “non-serif” dial) of Rolex Submariner models to feature a “matte” dial, produced through the 1970s. This Rolex Submariner is in great condition. The case has been previously polished, but the lugs remain thick and even, with original beveled edges visible. The dial is flawless, with no chips, scratches, tool marks, etc. The original tritium lume is present on the dial and hands, aged to a beautiful yellow color. The original MK3 bezel insert is in good condition, with minimal wear.

Lastly, this Submariner comes on its a Rolex Oyster 93150 braceclet, with correct 580 endlinks, and has 11 full links with virtually no stretch.

Presenting the late 2026 Rolex Submariner No Date, reference 124060 — the purest expression of the Submariner legacy. Revered for its clean symmetry and timeless silhouette, this model continues to captivate collectors and purists alike. With no date display to interrupt the dial’s balance, the 124060 is a masterclass in functional minimalism and horological heritage.

The watch features a 41mm Oystersteel case, waterproof to 300 meters, housing Rolex’s advanced Caliber 3230 movement. This self-winding mechanical movement boasts a 70-hour power reserve, Chronergy escapement, and Parachrom hairspring — delivering exceptional accuracy, shock resistance, and reliability. Its black Cerachrom bezel in ceramic is scratch-resistant and fade-proof, while the lacquered black dial offers luminous hour markers for optimal legibility in all conditions.

Fitted with a three-link Oyster bracelet and Glidelock extension system, the watch ensures a secure and precise fit without the need for tools.

This unworn 2026 Submariner is delivered as a full set and includes:

PLEASE READ OUR GUIDELINES BELOW!

For safety reasons and to minimize risk of shipping loss, we must ship to Fedex Office or Ship Centers, where you can pick up your watch at your convenience. Please use the nearest Fedex Office or Ship Center as your shipping address on your order; this will prevent further delays for address changes. We will ensure the address is correct prior to confirming your order; do not worry.

Feel free to message us with any questions! If there is no Fedex Center near you, please use your home address as your shipping address and we will ensure we find an appropriate solution. Residential deliveries are still possible.

ROLEX Watches: All Rolex watches sold by us come with the Original Box, Green Chronometer Tag, booklets, and Warranty Card (if stated that “papers” are included in the listing information). The Warranty Card will be named and dated if applicable. Stickers will have been removed at the time of purchase from the Authorized Rolex Dealer, unless otherwise stated. The watch may be sized from the time of purchase however it has never been worn (if condition stated as “Unworn/New”) and comes with all standard links that come on Rolex Bracelet models. It may also come with the white serial tag, but that is not guaranteed as some Authorized Dealers keep the tag. Because we often stock several of the same model watch, even if the watch is pictured with the white serial tag, it is not guaranteed to come with it. The watch may also be newer than the noted on our listing. If we list as a 2021 Unworn, you may receive a 2022 Unworn. It is possible that the pictured watch in the ad has “stickers” on the watch, but you will receive a watch with stickers removed unless otherwise stated in the listing. You may receive a watch that has been wrapped in plastic by us, to prevent scratches during transit. Bezel protectors, even if pictured, are not always included.

Shipping

We prefer to use the Fedex Hold-At-Location service, meaning we ship your watch to the Fedex Office or Ship Center nearest you, where you can pick it up upon arrival. All of our shipments are insured and shipped Priority Overnight.

International shipping to select countries is done via Fedex International Priority shipping. Please be aware of all appropriate customs and import taxes you may incur. Failure to accept an international package will result in restocking fees on a case-by-case basis. We will ship to the nearest Fedex Ship Center to you, and you can pickup the package at your convenience.

In Person Showings

For safety reasons, we do not encourage in person showings or browsing. All of our operations are online and we deliver via Fedex Priority Overnight.

Trades

We happily take trades of Rolex, Omega, Audemars Piguet, Patek Philippe and most major brands towards any of our listed watches. If you wish to trade in your watch, please send photos and relevant information in your initial message, along with your desired trade value. Our offer for your watch is not binding and is subject to change or revocation. We process all of our trades via insured Fedex Priority Overnight shipping; we ship the watch you are receiving after we receive your watch and the appropriate cleared payment, if a balance is due to us.

Price Suggestions

We may have Price Suggestions enabled on some of our listings; this does not mean we are obligated to negotiate on these listings nor provide price reductions.

Payment

Payment is accepted through Chrono24 Trusted Checkout. We cannot hold watches for longer than 24 hours without proof of payment / payment confirmation. Please submit payment for your watch as soon as your order is confirmed to avoid delays and order cancellation.

All purchases are subject to the sales tax rate of your shipping address.

Returns

We offer a 100% Money Back Guarantee on all of our watches! Feel free to shop with confidence. You have 14 days to return your item. Watches must be in the exact same condition as they were shipped, not sized or altered in any way. If watches are not returned in the same condition, restocking fees may apply.

Offered for sale is a beautiful early-production Rolex Submariner 14060 from approximately 1991, representing the pure, two-line Submariner configuration that collectors love for its clean dial and classic proportions.

This example was recently serviced locally to ensure proper timekeeping and reliable performance, making it ready to be worn and enjoyed immediately. The watch presents in excellent vintage condition with strong case lines, a sharp bezel, and a clean dial and handset. Based on visual inspection, the case appears thick and well-preserved, showing honest wear consistent with age but no signs of heavy polishing.

Notably, the original green caseback sticker is still present — a detail seldom seen on pieces of this era and a great sign of careful ownership over the years.

The bracelet is tight for its age and shows normal light wear. Overall, this is a very attractive, honest example of an early 14060 that strikes the perfect balance between vintage charm and everyday usability.

Highlights:
• Reference 14060 (No-Date Submariner)
• Circa 1991 production
• Recently serviced locally for proper running condition
• Excellent vintage condition with strong case
• Original green caseback sticker still intact
• Clean dial, hands, and bezel
• Ready to wear. Will fit up to a 7.5 inch wrist with the sizing as is.

A highly collectible early Submariner that captures the essence of Rolex’s tool-watch heritage — increasingly difficult to find in this kind of honest, well-preserved condition.

Timegrapher readings available upon request. Watch is running strong.

Rolex Yacht-Master 37 – Everose Gold Oysterflex – Ref. 268655

There’s something almost unfairly seductive about the 37mm Everose Yacht-Master on Oysterflex. Warm 18k rose gold glows against matte black Cerachrom and the deep black dial, but it never feels loud; instead, it feels intimate, like a secret luxury you wear against your skin. The rubber strap wraps the wrist with a softness that belies its toughness, making the heavy gold case float like it was born there. Turn it in the light and the polished raised numerals on the bezel catch fire, while the dial stays velvet dark and serene. It’s the Yacht-Master attitude distilled: nautical soul, red-carpet polish, and the quiet confidence of knowing most people will never even realize you’re wearing solid gold. Understated decadence that feels like cheating the dress code in the best possible way.

Offered for sale is a beautiful early-production Rolex Submariner 14060 from approximately 1991, representing the pure, two-line Submariner configuration that collectors love for its clean dial and classic proportions.

This example was recently serviced locally to ensure proper timekeeping and reliable performance, making it ready to be worn and enjoyed immediately. The watch presents in excellent vintage condition with strong case lines, a sharp bezel, and a clean dial and handset. Based on visual inspection, the case appears thick and well-preserved, showing honest wear consistent with age but no signs of heavy polishing.

Notably, the original green caseback sticker is still present — a detail seldom seen on pieces of this era and a great sign of careful ownership over the years.

The bracelet is tight for its age and shows normal light wear. Overall, this is a very attractive, honest example of an early 14060 that strikes the perfect balance between vintage charm and everyday usability.

Highlights:
• Reference 14060 (No-Date Submariner)

• Original green caseback sticker still intact

A highly collectible early Submariner that captures the essence of Rolex’s tool-watch heritage — increasingly difficult to find in this kind of honest, well-preserved condition.

Rolex Yacht-Master 37 – Everose Gold Oysterflex – Ref. 268655

There’s something almost unfairly seductive about the 37mm Everose Yacht-Master on Oysterflex. Warm 18k rose gold glows against matte black Cerachrom and the deep black dial, but it never feels loud; instead, it feels intimate, like a secret luxury you wear against your skin. The rubber strap wraps the wrist with a softness that belies its toughness, making the heavy gold case float like it was born there. Turn it in the light and the polished raised numerals on the bezel catch fire, while the dial stays velvet dark and serene. It’s the Yacht-Master attitude distilled: nautical soul, red-carpet polish, and the quiet confidence of knowing most people will never even realize you’re wearing solid gold. Understated decadence that feels like cheating the dress code in the best possible way.

The Rolex GMT-Master II 126713GRNR, nicknamed the “Bruce Wayne,” is one of the newest and most refined additions to Rolex’s GMT lineup. Crafted in stainless steel and 18k yellow gold, this stunning two-tone timepiece delivers the perfect balance of sporty elegance and travel-ready functionality.

The black and grey Cerachrom ceramic bezel gives the watch a sleek, modern contrast — a fresh look that stands apart from the classic Batman or Root Beer editions. Its 24-hour bi-directional bezel and GMT hand allow tracking of a second time zone, making it ideal for frequent travelers.

The black dial is pure sophistication, featuring luminous Chromalight hour markers and gold accents that add warmth and depth to its appearance. The signature Cyclops lens magnifies the date at 3 o’clock, a hallmark of Rolex design.

Powered by the Rolex Caliber 3285, the watch offers a 70-hour power reserve and Superlative Chronometer certification, ensuring exceptional precision and durability. The Oyster case is water-resistant to 100 meters, built for both adventure and everyday wear.

This model comes on the elegant Oyster bracelet, crafted from stainless steel and yellow gold, complete with the Oysterlock safety clasp and Easylink extension system for easy adjustments.

Offered here as a Full Set with original box and papers, the Rolex GMT-Master II 126713GRNR “Bruce Wayne” combines cutting-edge technology with timeless style — a modern classic that represents the evolution of the GMT legend.

Introducing the Rolex Datejust 41mm in Oystersteel and White Gold, a horological marvel that seamlessly combines resilience and sophistication. With its distinguished Fluted Bezel, Jubilee Bracelet, and a captivating Green Motif Dial adorned with crisp indices, this Rolex is an emblem of enduring elegance and precision craftsmanship.

The Oystersteel case, known for its robustness, frames the iconic fluted bezel, a design element that not only adds a touch of timeless refinement but also signifies the meticulous attention to detail that Rolex is renowned for. The intricate fluting pattern enhances the watch's overall aesthetic, embodying a perfect blend of strength and sophistication.

The Green Motif Dial serves as a captivating focal point, featuring crisp indices that contribute to the dial's clarity and the watch's modern allure. The silver-toned hands elegantly sweep across the dial, while the Rolex crown at 12 o'clock signifies a commitment to excellence and precision, resulting in a harmonious fusion of form and function.

Powered by Rolex's exceptional automatic movement, the Datejust 41mm guarantees accuracy and reliability. The date window at 3 o'clock, magnified by the cyclops lens, adds a practical touch without compromising the watch's clean design. The watch is equipped with a screw-down crown and case back, ensuring water resistance and durability suitable for everyday wear.

The Jubilee Bracelet, meticulously crafted from a blend of Oystersteel and White Gold, not only exemplifies strength but also adds a touch of opulence to the timepiece. The five-piece link design offers both comfort and visual appeal, while the concealed folding Crownclasp ensures a secure fit. The Easylink extension system allows for seamless adjustments, providing a personalized and comfortable wearing experience.

In summary, the Rolex Datejust 41mm in Oystersteel and White Gold with Fluted Bezel, Jubilee Bracelet, and Green Motif Dial is a celebration of timeless style and precision engineering. It stands as a symbol of enduring elegance, capturing the essence of Rolex's commitment to excellence in the world of haute horology.

The Rolex GMT-Master II Reference 126720VTNR-0002, affectionately known as the “Sprite,” stands as one of the most unconventional and talked-about additions to the GMT lineup. Originally introduced in 2022, this version—with its Jubilee bracelet—combines Rolex’s technical precision with an unexpected twist: a left-handed crown and date window. The 2026 production year makes this unworn example a particularly desirable find for collectors seeking both innovation and rarity.

The watch features a 40mm Oystersteel case fitted with a bidirectional Cerachrom bezel in green and black—an exclusive color combination in the GMT-Master II family. Powered by the in-house Caliber 3285, the watch delivers an impressive 70-hour power reserve and precision certified by COSC and Rolex’s Superlative Chronometer standards. The black dial is marked with luminous Chromalight hour markers and a green GMT hand for tracking a second time zone. Its Jubilee bracelet, known for comfort and elegance, is secured with the Oysterlock safety clasp and Easylink extension system, allowing quick micro-adjustments.

The Rolex Submariner Date Ref. 116613LB, also known as the “Bluesy,” is one of the most iconic and eye-catching Submariners ever made. Crafted from Rolesor—a combination of stainless steel and 18k yellow gold—it perfectly blends sportiness, luxury, and everyday wearability.

This model features a striking sunburst blue dial paired with a matching blue Cerachrom ceramic bezel, giving it a vibrant and unmistakable look that changes beautifully under different lighting. The dial includes luminous hour markers and hands for perfect legibility underwater or in low light, along with the classic Cyclops lens over the date at 3 o’clock.

Inside is the Rolex Caliber 3135 automatic movement, known for its precision, durability, and smooth performance. The 40mm Oyster case is water-resistant up to 300 meters (1,000 feet), making it a true diver’s watch that’s equally at home with a wetsuit or a suit.

The two-tone Oyster bracelet in steel and yellow gold features the secure Oysterlock clasp and Glidelock extension system, allowing quick micro-adjustments for the perfect fit.

The Rolex Submariner Date 116613LB combines professional dive-watch performance with unmistakable style. Whether you’re a collector or simply love a watch that turns heads, this “Bluesy” is a perfect mix of Rolex heritage, luxury, and bold character.

This listing is for a Rolex Datejust reference 1601. It is not just any 1601 however, it is a two tone variation (steel and rose gold). Not only that, but this is one of the earliest 1601s produced, and the dial is a Radium dial which is extremely rare. There are very few examples like this out there. A true classic and piece for a collector.

The Rolex Reference 1601, introduced in 1961, is a classic model in Rolex’s esteemed Datejust line, known for its timeless design and enduring elegance. This reference exemplifies the blend of sophistication and functionality that Rolex is renowned for, making it a coveted piece among collectors and enthusiasts.

At the heart of the 1601’s appeal is its clean, versatile aesthetic. The watch features a 36mm stainless steel case, which was considered a standard size for men’s watches at the time and remains perfectly proportioned for contemporary tastes. The case is complemented by a smooth, polished bezel that frames the watch’s iconic face with understated grace.

The dial of the 1601 is where its character truly shines. Typically, it is available in a range of finishes, including silver, black, and champagne, with either stick or Roman numerals, or sometimes a combination of both. The distinctive feature of the 1601 is its date window, situated at 3 o’clock and enhanced with a cyclops lens magnifier mounted on the crystal. This practical yet elegant complication adds both functionality and visual interest to the watch.

The Reference 1601 is powered by the Rolex Caliber 1560 or 1570 movement, known for its reliability and precision. This self-winding movement was a significant advancement in Rolex’s mechanical watchmaking, providing accurate timekeeping and robustness. The watch’s movement is housed within a case that boasts a screw-down crown and a robust Oyster case construction, ensuring durability and water resistance—a hallmark of Rolex design.


Overall, the Rolex Reference 1601 stands as a testament to the brand’s commitment to quality and timeless design. Its classic aesthetic, reliable movement, and versatile appearance ensure that it remains a beloved choice among watch aficionados and collectors.

The Rolex Submariner Date 126619LB is the ultimate blend of luxury and performance. Crafted entirely from solid 18k white gold, this watch delivers the rugged reliability of the Submariner with an unmistakably refined, high-end finish.

The striking blue Cerachrom bezel and deep black dial give this model a modern and sophisticated look — a sleek evolution of the legendary “Smurf” design. The 40mm Oyster case maintains perfect proportions and is water-resistant up to 300 meters (1,000 feet), making it as functional as it is beautiful.

The black dial features luminous Chromalight hour markers and hands that glow long-lasting blue in low light, ensuring readability in any condition. A Cyclops lens magnifies the date at 3 o’clock, adding Rolex’s signature touch of practicality.

Inside beats the Rolex Caliber 3235, an automatic movement with a 70-hour power reserve, paramagnetic blue Parachrom hairspring, and Chronergy escapement, offering precision, durability, and efficiency beyond standard chronometers.

The watch is paired with the solid 18k white gold Oyster bracelet, featuring the Oysterlock safety clasp and Glidelock extension system for a perfect, secure fit.

The Rolex Submariner 126619LB is a true statement piece — timeless, powerful, and built to impress. Whether for diving, collecting, or daily wear, it stands as one of the most luxurious sport watches ever made.

Rolex Milgauss Green Crystal Black Dial
116400GV

The exceptional Rolex Milgauss 116400GV has joined our collection. This sophisticated timepiece features the instantly recognizable green sapphire crystal that gives the watch its distinctive "GV" designation—standing for "Glace Verte" or green glass—creating a subtle green halo effect around the dial that's unmistakably Rolex.

The striking black dial offers the perfect backdrop for the vibrant orange lightning bolt seconds hand—a playful nod to the watch's scientific heritage and electromagnetic resistance capabilities. Applied hour markers filled with blue Chromalight luminescence ensure exceptional legibility while adding a subtle splash of color that complements the watch's unique character.

Encased in a robust 40mm Oystersteel case and powered by Rolex's exceptional caliber 3131 movement with antimagnetic properties, the Milgauss lives up to its name by withstanding magnetic fields up to 1,000 gauss—a feature originally developed for scientists and engineers working in environments with powerful electromagnetic fields.

First introduced in 1956 and reimagined with the green crystal in 2007, the Milgauss represents one of Rolex's most distinctive professional models, combining serious technical innovation with playful design elements that set it apart from the rest of the Rolex portfolio.

A perfect acquisition for collectors who appreciate horological innovation with a dash of personality.
