Rolex Submariner Date – Ref. 126613LN – Unworn – Complete Set – 41mm

This listing is for a Rolex Submariner Date, reference 126613LN, offered in unworn condition and as a complete set with original box and papers. This model features the updated 41mm Oyster case, crafted from 904L Oystersteel and solid 18k yellow gold, delivering the perfect balance of durability and luxury.

The watch is fitted with a classic black dial featuring applied hour markers and Mercedes hands, all filled with Chromalight luminous material for long-lasting blue luminescence and exceptional underwater legibility. The black Cerachrom bezel insert is virtually scratch-proof and fade-resistant, with a unidirectional rotating bezel designed for precise dive timing. A date window at 3 o’clock is enhanced by Rolex’s Cyclops magnification lens.

Powering the watch is the Rolex Caliber 3235 automatic movement, featuring the Chronergy escapement, Paraflex shock absorbers, and a Parachrom hairspring for outstanding precision, efficiency, and reliability. The movement is certified as a Superlative Chronometer, tested to Rolex’s strict −2/+2 seconds per day standard.

The watch is fitted with a two-tone Oyster bracelet in stainless steel and yellow gold, secured by the Oysterlock safety clasp with Glidelock extension system, allowing fine adjustment without tools. With 300 meters of water resistance, the Submariner Date is engineered for professional diving while remaining an iconic everyday luxury watch.

A highly sought-after modern Submariner in unworn condition, prized for its timeless design, precious metal accents, and complete set status.

Introducing the Rolex Cosmograph Daytona 126506, a modern icon of luxury and performance. Crafted entirely in platinum, the most prestigious metal in fine watchmaking, this reference stands at the very top of the Daytona collection. Its weight, brilliance, and exclusivity make it instantly recognizable to connoisseurs.

The 40mm platinum case is fitted with a chestnut brown Cerachrom ceramic bezel with engraved tachymeter scale, reinforcing the Daytona’s legacy as the ultimate racing chronograph. The signature ice-blue dial, reserved exclusively for Rolex platinum models, features sunburst finishing, Chromalight luminescence, and three contrasting subdials for precise chronograph functions.

Powering the watch is the new Rolex Caliber 4131 automatic movement, offering a 72-hour power reserve, anti-magnetic protection, and COSC + Rolex Superlative Chronometer certification for accuracy within -2/+2 seconds per day. The platinum Oyster bracelet with polished center links and Oysterlock clasp ensures durability and comfort with unmistakable Rolex elegance.

The Daytona 126506 Platinum Ice-Blue Dial is more than a watch—it is a symbol of exclusivity, prestige, and technical mastery. Highly sought-after and produced in very limited numbers, it remains one of the most collectible Rolex platinum chronographs available today.

The Rolex Oyster Perpetual 41, reference 134300-0006, introduced in 2025, embodies the latest generation of one of Rolex’s most iconic timepieces. As the direct successor to the 124300, this model refines the essence of the Oyster Perpetual line with subtle updates in design, ergonomics, and finishing, while preserving its reputation as a timeless, versatile watch that appeals to collectors and enthusiasts alike.

The 41mm case, crafted in corrosion-resistant Oystersteel, offers a perfect balance of presence and comfort on the wrist. Inside beats the in-house Caliber 3230, equipped with Rolex’s Chronergy escapement, Parachrom hairspring, and a robust 70-hour power reserve — combining precision, reliability, and efficiency. The smooth, polished bezel frames the striking pistachio green dial, whose refined sunray finish and luminous Chromalight markers ensure clarity and elegance in every light. Completing the look is the classic Oyster bracelet, with its three-piece solid links and Oysterclasp, ensuring durability and comfort throughout daily wear.

This unworn timepiece is offered as a full set, including:

Original Rolex presentation box
Rolex international warranty card, dated 2026
Instruction booklets
Green chronometer tag
Official Rolex cardholder

In accordance with Rolex policy, all protective stickers are removed by the authorized dealer at the time of sale. Nonetheless, this watch remains completely unworn, untouched, and in pristine condition.

The watch is in stock and ready for immediate shipment. Delivery is handled via FedEx Priority Overnight, fully insured, with an adult signature required upon receipt.

Every Rolex we present is guaranteed 100% authentic and original, giving you complete confidence in your purchase.

The Rolex Submariner Date reference 126610LN is the epitome of the Luxury Sports Watch and has maintained this spot for over half a century. A classic and timeless all original 18K yellow gold Rolex Day-Date 36 mm President featuring a champagne dial and fluted bezel, This watch was produced in 1983 and has model number 18078. This watch has never been polished before and has very little sag on the bracelet.

The watch retains its original finish and sharp case edges with no signs of rounding from polishing.

The case measures 36 mm wide, excluding the crown. The case houses a champagne dial with metallic finish and gold baton index markers. The dial is protected by a scratch resistant sapphire crystal, with a cyclops magnifier at 3 o'clock.

The watch has a date and day function, and a quickset function allowing the date to be set independently and quickly using the second setting on the pull out crown.

The yellow gold Presidential bracelet is still very crisp with very little sag for its age. It comes with 20 links, 2 end links, and 4 screws. and will fit a 7 inch wrist.

This watch has visible signs of use in the form of scratches and light hairline scratches throughout the case and bracelet. The watch is free from dents or dings.
The crystal and dial are free from damage.

This watch was recently serviced in house, it is keeping precise time and is water resistant, having been tested by machine.

About


The Rolex Datejust Stainless Steel/White Gold with a Silver Dial represents timeless elegance and enduring craftsmanship. This iconic model reflects Rolex’s commitment to precision and refined design. Its 36mm Oyster case is crafted from durable stainless steel. A fluted 18k white gold bezel adds unmistakable luxury and visual contrast.

The silver dial delivers a clean and versatile aesthetic. Applied hour markers enhance legibility and balance. The date window at three o’clock features Rolex’s signature Cyclops magnification. This detail improves functionality while preserving classic styling.

Rolex introduced the Datejust line in 1945, marking a major horological milestone. The reference 16014 continued that legacy during the late twentieth century. It introduced the Caliber 3035 movement with a quickset date feature. This innovation improved everyday usability and set new standards.

An automatic movement powers the watch with reliable accuracy. The Oyster case construction ensures strong water resistance for daily wear. A Jubilee bracelet often completes the design with comfort and flexibility.

The Rolex Datejust 36 Stainless Steel/White Gold with a Silver Dial appeals to collectors seeking understated sophistication. It transitions effortlessly from formal to casual settings. Its vintage character adds charm and historical value.

As a result, the Rolex Datejust 16014 remains a must-have for enthusiasts. It offers heritage, versatility, and lasting investment appeal in one iconic timepiece.
